message:
feat: Add M4 Phase 4 - Complete all input types support

Implements support for all remaining form input types: checkboxes, radio
buttons, select dropdowns, and submit buttons. M4 milestone now complete.

## All Input Types Supported

### Radio Buttons
- input[type=radio] → Toggle via click()
- Reuses toggleCheckbox() function (works for both checkbox and radio)
- Automatic page refresh shows selection
- Radio groups handled by browser

### Select/Dropdown
- select element → Click to activate
- Browser handles native dropdown UI
- Keyboard navigation handled by browser
- Refresh shows selected value

### Submit Buttons
- input[type=submit] → Click to submit form
- Distinct from regular button elements
- Triggers form submission
- Refresh shows form results

### Updated Input Handling Logic

**Consolidated input type checking:**
```zig
if (std.mem.eql(u8, t, "checkbox") or std.mem.eql(u8, t, "radio")) {
    // Toggle checkbox or select radio button
    try interact_mod.toggleCheckbox(...);
    try self.refresh();
} else if (std.mem.eql(u8, t, "submit")) {
    // Submit button - click it
    try interact_mod.clickElement(...);
    try self.refresh();
}
```

**Added select element handling:**
```zig
else if (std.mem.eql(u8, elem.tag, "select")) {
    // Click select to activate dropdown
    try interact_mod.clickElement(...);
    try self.refresh();
}
```

## Complete M4 Feature Matrix

| Element | User Action | Implementation |
|---------|-------------|----------------|
| a[href] | Enter on link | clickElement() at center |
| button | Enter on button | clickElement() at center |
| input[text] | Enter → Type → Enter | Focus + text_input mode + insertText + pressEnter |
| input[password] | Enter → Type → Enter | Focus + text_input mode + insertText + pressEnter |
| input[checkbox] | Enter to toggle | toggleCheckbox() via click() |
| input[radio] | Enter to select | toggleCheckbox() via click() |
| input[submit] | Enter to submit | clickElement() at center |
| textarea | Enter → Type → Enter | Focus + text_input mode + insertText + pressEnter |
| select | Enter to activate | clickElement() to open dropdown |

## CDP Methods Used

**Runtime.evaluate (toggle):**
```javascript
document.querySelector('<selector>').click()
```
- Works for both checkbox and radio
- Browser handles checked state
- Radio groups auto-deselect others

**Input.dispatchMouseEvent (click):**
- Used for select elements
- Opens native dropdown
- Browser handles option selection

## User Experience Examples

**Checkbox Form:**
1. 'f' → Tab to checkbox → Status: "Input[checkbox]: Subscribe"
2. Enter → Toggles checkbox, refreshes
3. Visual confirmation of checked state

**Radio Group:**
1. 'f' → Tab to radio option 1 → Enter → Selected
2. Tab to radio option 2 → Enter → Selected (option 1 auto-deselects)

**Select Dropdown:**
1. 'f' → Tab to select → Status: "select: Choose option"
2. Enter → Opens dropdown (browser UI)
3. Arrow keys → Navigate options (browser)
4. Enter → Select option, refresh

**Complete Form Workflow:**
1. 'f' → Tab to username input → Enter → Type "admin" → Enter
2. Tab to password input → Enter → Type password → Enter
3. Tab to "Remember me" checkbox → Enter → Toggles
4. Tab to submit button → Enter → Submits form

## Phase 4 Complete

✅ Radio button support (toggle via click)
✅ Checkbox support (toggle via click)
✅ Select dropdown support (click to activate)
✅ Submit button support (click to submit)
✅ All input types now functional
✅ Builds successfully

## M4 Milestone Complete

All four phases implemented:
✅ Phase 1 - URL navigation prompt ('g' key)
✅ Phase 2 - Form mode with DOM querying and link navigation ('f' key)
✅ Phase 3 - Text input mode for form fields
✅ Phase 4 - All input types (checkbox, radio, select, submit)

**M4 (Interactive-lite inputs) is COMPLETE!**

Ready for: M5 - Packaging + docs
